creator: olli@lurza.secnetix.de
text:
I just noticed that gnats didn't handle my patches very well,
i.e. they got misformatted.  Therefore I have uploaded them
here:

http://www.secnetix.de/olli/tmp/patch-agent-mibgroup-hardware-fsys-fsys_getfsstats.c

http://www.secnetix.de/olli/tmp/patch-agent-mibgroup-ucd-snmp_disk_hw.c

Please download both of them.  Be sure you don't accidentally
convert tabs to spaces or vice versa.  These two patch files
replace the existing files with the same name in the "files"
subdirectory of the net-snmp port.

Best regards
   Oliver
